primary_intent: Stablecoin / tokenized cash / payment-network value-capture screen
secondary_intents: Produce theme-to-company handoff candidates (Circle, Coinbase, Visa, Mastercard, PayPal, Block)
Separate reserve economics, partner costs, redemption liquidity and regulatory obligations
execution_order: setup -> theme-to-company handoff -> six-lens test -> trigger overlays -> build evidence log -> ordinary-vs-workflow delta -> decision -> refresh plan
market_scope: US-listed public equities plus public/private read-throughs
routing_basis: The theme translates regulatory change and product adoption into public-company value capture across issuers, exchanges, card networks, payment processors, banks and blockchains.
routing_mismatch_risk: A payment-adoption memo could overstate equity actionability if reserve economics, partner costs, redemption liquidity and regulatory obligations are not separated.
followup_questions: Complete an expectation map plus reserve-yield/regulatory check on issuers before actionability?
Confirm whether issuers or distribution partners are the clearest equity expression for each sub-theme?
